title: Genie One enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Search and reuse past conversations**: You can now search your past Genie One conversations and bring previous context into your current conversation. See [Recall past conversations](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#recall-past-conversations).
* **Memory (Beta)**: Genie One can remember details you ask it to save, such as your preferences and workflows, and applies them in future conversations. See [Add to Genie One's memory](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#memory).
* **Run a scheduled task on demand**: When you author a scheduled task, you can now select **Run now** to run it immediately. See [Scheduled tasks](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#scheduled-tasks).
* **Mention scheduled tasks**: You can now @mention scheduled tasks in Genie One. See [Scheduled tasks](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#scheduled-tasks).
* **New chat loading fix**: Fixed a bug where a new chat showed a blank screen while waiting for the first response.
